records.notes: One of the most influential modern Chinese printmakers and visual artists of the twentieth century
Primary family archive contributor and important holder of family archival memory
Oversees the Gu Yuan Digital Museum archive system, international development, and digital preservation workflow

records.role: International Curator / Translation Director/Living Family Archive Representative/Intergenerational Curatorial Bridge
records.notes: Raised by Gu Yuan and his wife from infancy and accompanied them throughout their later years. Serves as the international curator for Gu Yuan’s artworks and oversees the international translation and cross-cultural interpretation of his artistic legacy. Contributes to family archive communication, intergenerational preservation, and international cultural outreach.

records.relationship: Eldest son of Wei Duan; great-grandson of Gu Yuan
records.notes: Currently based in China. Passionate about art, animation, and print media. His artworks have entered the art market in China. Represents the next generation of artistic development connected to the Gu Yuan family legacy and may pursue a future professional direction in the arts.
Represents the younger generation connected to the Gu Yuan family archive
Participates in international cultural and educational development connected to the archive project
Represents the younger generation connected to the Gu Yuan family archive
Internationally recognized contemporary artist influenced by Gu Yuan’s teaching and artistic philosophy
Major institutional archive and exhibition center dedicated to Gu Yuan’s artistic legacy
Gu Yuan served as professor and President of CAFA
Colby College student contributing to research, art history, and international archive development
Shattuck-St. Mary’s student representing youth cultural exchange and international engagement
Represents the future generation of cultural preservation and youth archive participation
Married Gu Yuan in Yan’an in 1944. Accompanied and supported Gu Yuan throughout his artistic and family life. Important figure within the Gu Yuan family history and archive memory.
Son of Gu Yuan and part of the Gu Yuan family lineage.
Daughter of Gu Yuan and part of the Gu Yuan family lineage.
